evals.name: classification-training
evals.prompt: Train a model to predict customer churn using the data at eda-workspace/test-datasets/churn_data.csv. The target column is 'churned'. Use proper cross-validation and compare at least 2 model families.
evals.expected_output: Should split data, build pipeline, train baseline, try multiple models with CV, select best, evaluate ONCE on test set, save model artifact.

assertions.text: Splits data before any preprocessing or model fitting
Cross-validates on training set only (not full dataset)
Compares at least 2 different model families
Evaluates on test set only once at the end
Saves the trained model as a serialized artifact
Reports classification metrics (accuracy, F1, or AUC)
